metadata.notes: Every fact is sourced. ⚠️ = unconfirmed/assumed. Refine by correcting facts or adding new voice memo detail.

photo_system.instructions: Drop photos into character folders. Tell Claude 'process photos' to extract physical descriptions.
photo_system.status: ACTIVE — 12 characters with photo descriptions extracted (March 27, 2026)

shawn_cutter.location_current: Bechtel family farm, Ohio (March 2026) / Tampa, FL (primary)
shawn_cutter.occupation: AI Engineer, Founder — EnergiAcres, Phase 2 Labs

physical.scars: 40+ surgery scars. Self-harm scars on arm from high school. Scar from shattering left arm on 4-wheeler at 16.
physical.handicap_placard: Used one in college — Carina initially thought he was faking
physical.description: Lean, angular build. Strong jawline. As a teen: tall and wiry, blonde/light hair, clean-cut farm-kid look. By his 40s: shaved/bald head, lean and fit, light stubble, olive-toned skin from Florida sun. Big, wide smile — the kind that takes over his whole face. Favors black t-shirts, backwards caps, chunky glasses. High energy in how he carries himself — leans into photos, leans into conversations. In the graduation photo (late '90s) he's rail-thin in blue cap and gown, towering slightly over Beth. On a boat as a teen: bleached blonde hair, shirtless, lean but not yet filled out. Current era: clean lines, minimal — the black shirt and shaved head read as deliberate, like a man who stopped caring about vanity and started caring about velocity.

confirmed_traits: ENTJ, Capricorn, Gen X
Extreme technologist — cloud, AI, mobile, edge computing
Systems thinker — everything is a system to optimize
Cannot suffer fools — needs operators who've run companies to the end
Direct, reflective, Feynman-style explanations
Studies role models deeply: Jobs, Gates, Musk
Self-reflection now daily — 'analyzing what I'm feeling and thinking and why'
Compartmentalizer — learned to turn emotions off after trauma

self_harm.detail: Cut himself a lot in high school to control pain. Still has visible scars on arm.

emotional_wall.detail: Couldn't feel intensity of holding Gia for first time. 'Spent so much time in rational head, not emotional brain.'

open_questions: Physical description — what does Shawn look like?
What happened in the 'gap years' 2007-2009 (apartments to Plant City)?
The full accident story — morning to helicopter

chuck_cutter.cause_of_death: Heart attack. Had stents in leg (blockage exacerbated by motorcycle knee injuries). Combination of blood thinners + medication likely caused death. Doctor dismissed his concerns.

confirmed_traits: Dominant, intense, loudest person in the room
Hard worker — expected the same from his boys
Oilfield operator — trucks, rigs, field work
Getting softer as he aged — 'really looking forward to him being a grandpa'
Not gentle, not soft, but effective

key_moments.the_flight: Went up in Shawn's Cessna. Super quiet. Full pre-flight. Zero-G's spooked him. Wings after at BBQ place.
key_moments.met_gia: May 2010 — had about 6 months with her before dying.
key_moments.motorcycle_accident: Knee injuries → stents → blood thinners → death. When this happened is unknown.
key_moments.death_scene: 5:15 AM. CJ called Shawn at 3:30 AM. Doctor had dismissed Chuck's concerns about medication.
key_moments.funeral: Shawn spoke, CJ spoke, Butch Rogers (former accountant and pastor) spoke.

physical.description: Stocky, barrel-chested, thick through the shoulders and arms — a man built by decades of oilfield work. Dark hair, always a full mustache (the signature). Tanned and weathered skin. Gold chain visible at the collar of his white t-shirts. Almost always in a ball cap — the pink 'Cutter Oil Co' cap with the pump jack logo is iconic. White pocket t-shirt with a pack of Marlboros in the breast pocket (visible in the photo holding baby Gia). Hairy chest. Big, thick hands. In the truck photo (dated 7/8/97): behind the wheel of a blue pickup, cap on, mustache, arm resting on the door — completely in his element. On the boat: shirtless, straw hat, phone to his ear, legs sprawled out — king of wherever he was sitting. With cattle: flannel shirt, green cap, standing next to a black Angus — the working version of Chuck. The graduation photo shows him at maybe 5'9"-5'10", solid, thick-necked, white short-sleeve shirt. In the close-up with the blonde woman: dark eyes, strong brow, mustache flecked with gray, the Cutter Oil cap, face that says 'I've been in the sun my whole life.' Holding Gia: softened. Ballcap on, white shirt, Marlboros in the pocket — but looking DOWN at this baby with an expression that breaks the whole tough-guy frame. That's the photo that proves he was getting softer.

the_thread.forged: The ruler. The force. The operating system Shawn absorbed.
the_thread.fractured: The absence during recovery? The expectations during healing? (GAP)
the_thread.forging: The last flight. The death. The 3:30 AM call. The funeral.
the_thread.foundry: The ghost. 'If Chuck could see EnergiAcres.' The softening he never got to finish.

direct_quotes_from_shawn: Chuck was getting softer as he was getting older. I was really looking forward to him being a grandpa.
I didn't start sounding like Chuck until the kids were maybe 4 or 5.
You need to listen to the doctors. But you need to make the decision for yourself.
Chuck died about 5:15 in the morning.

beth_cutter.maiden_family: Bechtel — the farm is HER family heritage. Same farm since Ohio was a state.
beth_cutter.current_status: Still working the acreage at 67. Blowing off the yard, tending the garden.

confirmed_traits: Quiet center of the entire story
Protector — shielded boys from Chuck's intensity at times
Unconditional love — puts others first to her own detriment
Eternal love in her heart despite everything Chuck put her through
Refuses to sell the main Bechtel farm
Still working at 67 because Cedar Valley plan to retire her failed

what_she_endured: Cedar Valley failure — the plan to retire her didn't work
beth_cutter.critical_fact: The farm-to-tech-to-farm arc goes through MOM'S lineage, not Chuck's. Bechtel family heritage.

physical.description: Blonde, wavy/curly hair — long, past her shoulders, with natural volume. At 67, still looks strong and capable. Medium build, not frail — a woman who works outside. In the restaurant photo: white jacket over a tan turtleneck, pouring herself a drink, expression focused and composed — elegant but not fussy. At home outside the house (possibly the farm): blue dress, long blonde wavy hair loose, bracelet on her wrist, warm smile, standing near the car like she's about to go somewhere or just got back from something. The graduation photo (~1997) shows her with shorter, lighter blonde hair, beige/cream outfit, standing next to young Shawn — she comes up to about his shoulder. She carries herself with a quiet steadiness. Nothing flashy. The kind of woman who looks the same at a restaurant as she does in the garden.

the_thread.forged: The protector. The steady one. Held the house together while Chuck ran the world outside.
the_thread.fractured: Mother of a broken child. 40 surgeries. How did she survive it? (MAJOR GAP)
the_thread.forging: Background — barely appears. Chuck's death, but Beth's experience of it is unknown.
the_thread.foundry: Still working at 67. Cedar Valley was supposed to retire her. The farm is HER lineage. The whole story comes back to her ground.

direct_quotes_from_shawn: She's amazing. What she had to endure... eternal love in her heart.
She's done enough — it's time for the kids to step up.
She's a protector. She puts others first to her own detriment.
Get my mom to retirement. Build something sustainable, sell the business and the farm.
beth_cutter.cutter_rule: The loudest person in the room gets the stories. The quietest one keeps the room standing.

cj_cutter.born: ⚠️ Unknown — older than Shawn, so before 1979
cj_cutter.current_status: Blocked Shawn's number ~2017. Still blocked. Now a grandfather.

confirmed_traits: Bigger than Shawn (20-25 lbs heavier as kids)
The oldest sibling
Now a grandfather
Relationship with Shawn is currently blocked

the_fighting.detail: Constant fighting. CJ was 20-25 lbs bigger. Door slamming incident (pinned CJ between wall and door, doorknob hitting side). Pillowcase + empty shampoo bottle = knocked CJ out. Strategy: hit hard enough CJ can't get back up, then run.

the_good.detail: Built forts together. Worked together on the farm. Shared a bedroom (water beds, TV, model planes).

the_rock.detail: CJ threw a rock at Shawn ON PURPOSE — 30-32 stitches. Part of '87 stitches before the car accident, half from CJ.'

key_moments.the_40_percent_ask: End of 2009 — CJ asked for 40% of Fielding Systems. Shawn had written all the code and built everything.
key_moments.the_blocking: ~2017 — CJ blocked Shawn's number. CJ was treating siblings badly, Shawn told him what he thought.
key_moments.the_3am_call: November 12, 2010 — CJ called Shawn at 3:30 AM to tell him Chuck had a heart attack.
key_moments.the_pipeline_attempt: Mom brought them together for a pipeline/gas storage deal. But CJ still blocked.

physical.description: ⚠️ No physical description. 20-25 lbs bigger than Shawn as kids.

the_thread.forged: The other half of 'the Cutters outside.' Shared bedroom, forts, fighting, farm work.
the_thread.fractured: Where was CJ during the accident and recovery? (GAP)
the_thread.forging: The 40% ask. The blocking. The 3:30 AM call. The funeral.

carina_cutter.spelling_note: CARINA — spelled with a C, not a K
carina_cutter.married: July 8, 2006 — on her birthday. Las Vegas. Elvis package.

physical.description: Long, straight blonde hair — lighter than Beth's, with a warm honey tone. Fair, clear complexion. Slim, tall build. In the bar selfie: cream ribbed sweater, soft smile, hair falling past her shoulders, face lit by warm ambient light — composed and pretty in an effortless way. Full-body in NYC: black dress with gold stitching detail, long blonde hair, slim figure, confident posture — she looks like she belongs in whatever city she's in. Beach photo with one of the girls: denim jacket over white top and pink/mauve shorts, baseball cap, bare feet in the sand at sunset — relaxed, happy, arm around her kid. She reads as someone who puts herself together well but doesn't make it the point.

how_they_met.detail: At Miami University (Oxford, OH). She was friends with 'the townies' — local Oxford, OH-raised students. 'They essentially grew up in a cornfield, much like I did.'

the_handicap_placard.detail: When Carina first saw Shawn's handicap placard, she thought he was a jerk parking in a handicap spot. He was actually handicapped. Had a placard and a scooter — 'the scooter guy at college' — little moped with a weed eater motor.

the_elopement.detail: Las Vegas, 2006. Little White Wedding Chapel. Elvis package. Only Chris and Patty came. The dress broke (clasp/seam). Called parents from the limo. Parents hated it. Had a 'reception of swords' at Thanksgiving timeframe later that year.

therapy.detail: Couples therapy started 2023 — 'we were not in a good place.' Then pivoted to individual therapy for Shawn when it became clear 'this is Shawn's doing — he's got real trauma issues.' Now 'incrementally better week by week.'

confirmed_traits: Married someone with 40 surgeries and a handicap placard
Endured the startup years (Fielding), the corporate years (Quorum), the hard years (Phase 2 Labs)
Initiated couples therapy in 2023
Incrementally better week by week with Shawn

the_thread.forged: Not present — they hadn't met yet.
the_thread.fractured: Not present in current timeline (unless college overlap).
the_thread.forging: The elopement. The Aria bed moment (she was sleeping). The Fielding/Quorum years. Gia's birth (32 hours).
the_thread.foundry: Therapy. 'Incrementally better.' The partner who has to live with the emotional wall.

direct_quotes_from_shawn: We were not in a good place. (about 2023)

birth.detail: 32 hours of labor. Baby stressed. Almost C-section. Shawn barely held her. Emotional wall — 'I don't think I felt the same intensity that I even feel right now.'

grandpa_chuck.detail: Chuck met Gia May 2010. Had ~6 months with her before dying Nov 12, 2010.

the_book.detail: Gia does NOT know about the book. Everyone knows about the accident — 'probably tired of hearing it because it gets used when they want to ride a motorcycle or cross the road.'

physical.description: Blonde hair — long, straight to slightly wavy, honey-toned like Carina's. Light freckles across the nose and cheeks. Brown eyes. Bright, full smile. At 15-16 she's growing into her features — in the beanie photo: pink 'Hagen Well Service' beanie, gray graphic hoodie, arms crossed, side braid, warm smile with a hint of mischief. In the close-up portrait: long straight blonde hair, delicate gold necklace, black t-shirt, freckles visible, natural and unaffected — she looks like she got Carina's coloring and Shawn's energy in the eyes. Night photo with Shawn by the waterfront: black graphic hoodie, hair pulled back, standing next to her dad — she's already almost as tall as him. She carries herself with a teenager's mix of confidence and not-yet-knowing.

the_thread.forging: Her birth is the emotional wall moment. The price of all the armor Shawn built.
the_thread.foundry: The legacy question. What is Shawn building FOR her?

open_questions: Exact birth month?

key_facts.note: Very little confirmed about Tessa individually. Born 2012, two years after Gia.

physical.description: Darker hair than Gia — brown, pulled back. Braces. Athletic build — looks like she plays sports. Light eyes (possibly green or hazel). In the photo: pink athletic top, hair pulled back in a ponytail, standing outside in the Florida sun, big smile showing braces, small gold hoop earrings. She's younger and more compact than Gia — different energy, more grounded and direct in how she stands. Where Gia has Carina's willowy quality, Tessa reads as sturdier, more physical.

physical.description: Long, wavy caramel-brown hair with honey highlights — similar coloring to Beth but darker, warmer. Brown eyes. Bright, wide smile. Olive-toned skin, slightly tanned. Fit, athletic build. In the professional headshot: hair in big loose waves, black top, warm confident expression — she looks polished and put-together. Office selfie with Shawn: gray athletic top with what appears to be an EnergiAcres/company logo, hair pulled back, sunglasses on top of her head, sitting at a desk — she looks like she works WITH Shawn. At a Cleveland Cavaliers game with her son: long brown hair, big smile, arm around the boy in a Cavs jersey. In the kitchen: long straight brown hair, white sweatshirt, holding a jar, laughing — genuinely warm energy. She has Chuck's coloring but Beth's warmth in her face.

key_facts.note: Younger brother. 'Different household dynamic' — grew up in a different era of Chuck. Very little confirmed.
key_facts.works_with_shawn: Wearing a 'Cutter' branded company t-shirt in kitchen photo — possibly involved in family business or EnergiAcres.

physical.description: Stockier than Shawn — more compact, thicker through the chest and shoulders. Short dark brown hair, full beard/stubble. Big, warm smile. He looks more like Chuck's build than Shawn does — the shorter, thicker Cutter frame vs. Shawn's lean angular frame. In the selfie with Shawn: dark hair, dark stubble, wearing a black shirt — he's got a rounder face and heavier build. In the kitchen: standing in front of cherry wood cabinets, black 'Cutter' t-shirt, jeans, phone in both hands, grinning — stocky, strong, comfortable in his own skin. He reads as the physical bridge between Chuck and Shawn.

key_facts.mike_huff_connection: Jeff's best friend from school. Jeff brought Mike to Fielding as 4th hire.

physical.description: Clean-cut, professional look. Short reddish-brown hair, neatly trimmed. Rectangular dark-framed glasses. Clean-shaven. Wearing a dark blazer over a light blue collared shirt in the headshot — the kind of guy who looks equally comfortable in a boardroom and a garage. Medium build, not heavy. His face reads as precise and attentive — CTO energy. The glasses and grooming suggest someone who values order and clarity.

mike_huff.name_correction: Originally transcribed as 'Mike Hobbs' — CORRECTED Session 5 to Mike HUFF.

physical.description: Solid, stocky build. Dark hair under a black ball cap. Stubble/light beard. Wraparound sunglasses. Gray long-sleeve t-shirt with dark trim. In the fishing boat photo: he's looking at the camera with a steady, no-nonsense expression — not unfriendly, just focused. Fishing rods behind him. He reads as a practical, hands-on guy. The kind of person Jeff Taton would be best friends with from school — solid, reliable, not flashy.

sasha_nelson.relationship: Best engineer Shawn ever worked with. Worked at Quorum on Cognitive Land.

key_facts.cognitive_land: Built Cognitive Land at Quorum — 'what is now GPT.' AI-first platform ingesting land/lease agreements, learning from user corrections, capturing tacit knowledge. Applied to all forms of contracts. 'Pretty gnarly shit. We were bleeding edge.'
key_facts.one_resource: Quorum only gave Shawn ONE resource for this project. Sasha was it. 'I had to make it count.'
key_facts.the_relationship: 'Best engineer, best person I've worked with, smartest, stretched me the most.'
key_facts.departure: Left over frustration with Quorum (not with Shawn).
key_facts.the_regret: Shawn 'really fucked up that relationship' by getting busy with startups. 'Should have spent time researching with Sasha — we would have found our way.'

confirmed_traits: Brilliant engineer
Stretched Shawn the most
Best person he worked with (not just best engineer)
Left Quorum over frustration with the company

sasha_nelson.the_thread: Sasha → Cognitive Land → proto-GPT → the AI thread that runs through EnergiAcres. The relationship Shawn lost by spreading too thin is the same lesson that led to 'only enough founder energy for one.'

dave_mccarty.relationship: Fielding Systems employee who complicated the Quorum acquisition

key_facts.the_problem: Making TRIPLE what anyone else was. Given equity. Didn't appreciate it.
key_facts.the_acquisition: Flew to Tampa for diligence. Participated, then 'got weird.' Super suspicious they'd kick him out.
key_facts.the_sales: Great at sales. Shawn learned a lot from him. Asked tons of questions.
key_facts.the_lesson: People who are GIVEN equity don't appreciate it the same way. Shawn made this mistake multiple times before wising up.
key_facts.personality_note: 'Was on his period one week out of the month, at least, if not a couple.'

dave_mccarty.the_thread: Dave represents the 'equity tax' lesson. People who didn't build it don't fight for it the same way. This lesson echoes in 'cannot suffer fools' in Foundry.
open_questions: Where is Dave now?
What happened to Dave after Quorum acquisition closed?

joe_norris.relationship: Quorum Software — the person who called to initiate the acquisition of Fielding

key_facts.the_call: Called Shawn. Shawn took all phone calls. The qualifying question: 'Does the company have an API?' — because Fielding got acquired early and they were going to keep building.
key_facts.after: Tyson and Perry flew to Tampa after the initial call.

andrew_palmer.relationship: One of Shawn's best friends. Lived about a mile down the road. Families go way back.

key_facts.childhood: Went to West Salem Elementary (rival school). Dad was neighbors with Shawn's mom. Biggest kid in class — tall, big. Shawn's 'nerd friend.' Both read a lot. Built caves and forts together.
key_facts.sci_fi: Got Shawn into sci-fi more than anyone. This connects to the Lawnmower Man / singularity thread.
key_facts.burning_man: Took Shawn to his first Burning Man. 'That's the kind of friend he is.'
key_facts.therapy_support: 'So happy' Shawn was going to therapy. Said it would help relationships. 'He's absolutely right. Him saying that kept me going.'
key_facts.cancer: In remission. Battled cancer several times and won. Has a little girl he wasn't supposed to have.
key_facts.current: Lost touch a little. 'Definitely got to cultivate that relationship more.'

open_questions: What specifically did Andrew say that resonated?
Is Andrew a founder too? What's his background?

physical.description: Big — exactly as described. Tall, broad-shouldered, heavy build. In the bar photo (younger era): reddish-brown beard, thick brown/auburn hair, wearing a pink button-up shirt, holding a drink — he takes up space in the frame the way 'biggest kid in class' implies. Standing next to a younger Shawn (glasses, plaid shirt, slimmer) the size difference is obvious. He's the kind of big that isn't aggressive — more like a bear. Warm, genuine smile. The nerd friend who happens to be built like a lineman.

butch_rogers.relationship: Former accountant and pastor. Spoke at Chuck's funeral.

key_facts.funeral: Third speaker at Chuck's funeral (after Shawn and CJ).
key_facts.dual_role: Both the family's accountant AND a pastor.

physical.description: Asian American man, appears to be in his 40s-50s. Dark hair graying at the temples. Warm, easy smile. Wears thick-rimmed dark glasses. In the trucker cap photo: 'Sun Valley Outfitters Ketchum Idaho' green trucker cap, neat mustache, navy blue button-up shirt, standing in what looks like a lodge or cabin with taxidermy on the wall — outdoorsy, stylish in a relaxed way. In the desert/festival photo: white t-shirt under a colorful traditional-patterned vest/jacket (possibly Hmong or Southeast Asian heritage clothing), sunglasses with yellow lenses — at what looks like Burning Man or a desert gathering. In the selfie with Shawn: white zip-up jacket, dark hair swept to the side, graying, warm expression — they're clearly comfortable together, both grinning. He reads as someone who matches Shawn's energy — adventurous, eclectic, not afraid of bold choices.

character_relationships.core_tension: Chuck ↔ Beth (intensity vs. steadiness). This dynamic shaped everything.
character_relationships.the_brothers: CJ ↔ Shawn — fighting, forts, the 40% ask, the blocking. Currently unresolved.
character_relationships.the_marriage: Shawn ↔ Carina — handicap placard meeting, elopement, emotional wall, therapy, incrementally better.
character_relationships.the_inheritance: Shawn absorbed Chuck's operating system (intensity, work ethic, oilfield knowledge) but built on Beth's ground (the Bechtel farm).
character_relationships.the_engineers: Jeff Taynton → Mike Huff → Sasha Nelson → Donny Kerr. Each represents a phase of Shawn's builder journey.
character_relationships.the_ghost: Chuck's absence haunts Forging and Foundry. 'If Chuck could see EnergiAcres.'
character_relationships.the_wall: Shawn's emotional disconnection (from accident/trauma) affects every relationship — Carina, Gia, CJ, even professional ones (Sasha).

universal_gaps: No physical descriptions for ANY character. This is the #1 gap — readers need to SEE these people.
Beth's experience of the accident and surgeries is completely missing.
CJ's interior life is unknown — we only have Shawn's perspective.
Kristin and Josh are nearly blank.
Tessa has almost no individual detail.
No Amish neighbor character (mentioned in Forged questions but unnamed).
